description_long: This object is a small urban neighborhood scene featuring several modern residential houses arranged along paved pathways. The houses display a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, with some featuring rooftop terraces and visible outdoor furniture. The buildings are primarily constructed from concrete and brick, with large windows and minimalistic facades. Green lawns, shrubs, and a few trees are interspersed between the houses, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The color palette includes white, gray, red, and brown, with some blue accents on window frames and doors. The overall layout suggests a contemporary, planned residential area with clear separation between private and communal spaces.
description: A cluster of modern residential houses with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped green spaces, arranged along paved walkways in an urban neighborhood.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facades of several houses, showing a mix of flat and sloped roofs, green lawns, and a prominent red building on the left.
description_view_1: From this angle, the arrangement of houses around central pathways and the presence of rooftop terraces and outdoor greenery are more visible.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear and side elevations, revealing additional rooftop features, a blue-accented building, and more of the paved communal areas.
description_view_3: The view shows the neighborhood layout from the opposite side, with the red building and blue-accented house framing the scene and more greenery visible between the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with flat doors, minimal steps, and occasional overhangs or small porches
